name: tibco-vectordb-create-embeddings
title: Create Embeddings
description: Generate vector embeddings from text using OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Cohere, or Ollama. Supports single text and batch embedding.

display.description: Generate dense vector embeddings for RAG, semantic search, and clustering

display.name: VectorDB Connection
display.description: Optional. Select a VectorDB connection to inherit embedding settings from.

display.name: Use Connector Embedding Settings
display.description: Inherit the embedding provider, API key, and base URL from the VectorDB connection. Only the model needs to be set below. Requires 'Configure Embedding Provider' to be enabled on the connection.

display.name: API Key
display.description: API key / access token. Not required for Ollama or private networks.

display.name: Base URL
display.description: Override the default provider URL. OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1 | Azure: full deployment URL | Ollama: http://localhost:11434 | Custom: your endpoint.

display.name: Embedding Model
display.description: Model name. Examples: text-embedding-3-small (OpenAI), embed-english-v3.0 (Cohere), nomic-embed-text (Ollama).

display.name: Dimensions
display.description: Output vector size. 0 = model default. Supported by text-embedding-3-* models (e.g. 512, 1536, 3072).
